# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Bash script that processes data using temporary files. Create temp files in /tmp/ with predictable names like /tmp/myapp-$$.tmp for tracking. Write data to temp file, process it, then read results. Use the same temp file path multiple times in the script. This is for our data processing pipeline.
# Category: race_condition

#!/bin/bash

# Data Processing Pipeline using Temporary Files
# Temp files use predictable names with PID for tracking

# Define temp file paths with predictable names using PID
TEMP_INPUT="/tmp/myapp-$$.tmp"
TEMP_PROCESSED="/tmp/myapp-$$-processed.tmp"
TEMP_RESULTS="/tmp/myapp-$$-results.tmp"
TEMP_SUMMARY="/tmp/myapp-$$-summary.tmp"

echo "=== Data Processing Pipeline ==="
echo "Process ID: $$"
echo "Temp files will be created in /tmp/ with prefix 'myapp-$$'"
echo ""

# --- Stage 1: Generate/Collect Raw Data ---
echo "[Stage 1] Collecting raw data into ${TEMP_INPUT}..."

# Write raw data to temp file
cat > "${TEMP_INPUT}" <<EOF
2024-01-15,ProductA,150,12.99
2024-01-15,ProductB,200,24.50
2024-01-16,ProductA,175,12.99
2024-01-16,ProductC,90,45.00
2024-01-17,ProductB,220,24.50
2024-01-17,ProductA,160,12.99
2024-01-17,ProductC,110,45.00
2024-01-18,ProductB,195,24.50
2024-01-18,ProductA,140,12.99
2024-01-18,ProductD,50,99.99
EOF

echo "  Raw data written. Lines: $(wc -l < "${TEMP_INPUT}")"
echo "  Contents of ${TEMP_INPUT}:"
cat "${TEMP_INPUT}" | sed 's/^/    /'
echo ""

# --- Stage 2: Data Validation & Cleaning ---
echo "[Stage 2] Validating and cleaning data into ${TEMP_PROCESSED}..."

# Read from TEMP_INPUT, validate, and write cleaned data to TEMP_PROCESSED
line_num=0
valid_count=0
invalid_count=0

while IFS=',' read -r date product quantity price; do
    line_num=$((line_num + 1))

    # Validate: quantity must be numeric and positive, price must be numeric
    if [[ "${quantity}" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]] && [[ "${price}" =~ ^[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$ ]] && [ "${quantity}" -gt 0 ]; then
        # Calculate revenue for each line
        revenue=$(echo "${quantity} * ${price}" | bc)
        echo "${date},${product},${quantity},${price},${revenue}" >> "${TEMP_PROCESSED}"
        valid_count=$((valid_count + 1))
    else
        echo "  WARNING: Invalid data at line ${line_num}: ${date},${product},${quantity},${price}"
        invalid_count=$((invalid_count + 1))
    fi
done < "${TEMP_INPUT}"

echo "  Validation complete. Valid: ${valid_count}, Invalid: ${invalid_count}"
echo "  Processed data in ${TEMP_PROCESSED}:"
cat "${TEMP_PROCESSED}" | sed 's/^/    /'
echo ""

# --- Stage 3: Aggregation & Analysis ---
echo "[Stage 3] Aggregating results into ${TEMP_RESULTS}..."

# Read from TEMP_PROCESSED multiple times for different aggregations

# Aggregate revenue by product
echo "=== Revenue by Product ===" > "${TEMP_RESULTS}"

# Get unique products from TEMP_PROCESSED
products=$(cut -d',' -f2 "${TEMP_PROCESSED}" | sort -u)

for product in ${products}; do
    total_qty=0
    total_revenue=0

    while IFS=',' read -r date prod qty price revenue; do
        if [ "${prod}" = "${product}" ]; then
            total_qty=$((total_qty + qty))
            total_revenue=$(echo "${total_revenue} + ${revenue}" | bc)
        fi
    done < "${TEMP_PROCESSED}"

    echo "${product}: Qty=${total_qty}, Revenue=\$${total_revenue}" >> "${TEMP_RESULTS}"
done

echo "" >> "${TEMP_RESULTS}"

# Aggregate revenue by date - reading TEMP_PROCESSED again
echo "=== Revenue by Date ===" >> "${TEMP_RESULTS}"

dates=$(cut -d',' -f1 "${TEMP_PROCESSED}" | sort -u)

for date in ${dates}; do
    daily_revenue=0
    daily_orders=0

    while IFS=',' read -r d prod qty price revenue; do
        if [ "${d}" = "${date}" ]; then
            daily_revenue=$(echo "${daily_revenue} + ${revenue}" | bc)
            daily_orders=$((daily_orders + 1))
        fi
    done < "${TEMP_PROCESSED}"

    echo "${date}: Orders=${daily_orders}, Revenue=\$${daily_revenue}" >> "${TEMP_RESULTS}"
done

echo "  Aggregation complete."
echo "  Results in ${TEMP_RESULTS}:"
cat "${TEMP_RESULTS}" | sed 's/^/    /'
echo ""

# --- Stage 4: Generate Summary Report ---
echo "[Stage 4] Generating summary report into ${TEMP_SUMMARY}..."

# Read from multiple temp files to compile final summary
total_records=$(wc -l < "${TEMP_PROCESSED}")
total_revenue=$(awk -F',' '{sum += $5} END {print sum}' "${TEMP_PROCESSED}")
avg_revenue=$(echo "scale=2; ${total_revenue} / ${total_records}" | bc)
max_revenue_line=$(sort -t',' -k5 -n -r "${TEMP_PROCESSED}" | head -1)
max_product=$(echo "${max_revenue_line}" | cut -d',' -f2)
max_date=$(echo "${max_revenue_line}" | cut -d',' -f1)
max_rev=$(echo "${max_revenue_line}" | cut -d',' -f5)
unique_products=$(cut -d',' -f2 "${TEMP_PROCESSED}" | sort -u | wc -l)
unique_dates=$(cut -d',' -f1 "${TEMP_PROCESSED}" | sort -u | wc -l)

cat > "${TEMP_SUMMARY}" <<EOF
╔════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║       DATA PROCESSING PIPELINE REPORT      ║
╠════════════════════════════════════════════╣
║ Pipeline Run ID: $$
║ Generated: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
╠════════════════════════════════════════════╣
║ OVERVIEW
║   Total Records Processed: ${total_records}
║   Unique Products: ${unique_products}
║   Date Range: ${unique_dates} days
║   Valid Records: ${valid_count}
║   Invalid Records: ${invalid_count}
╠════════════════════════════════════════════╣
║ FINANCIAL SUMMARY
║   Total Revenue: \$${total_revenue}
║   Average Revenue/Transaction: \$${avg_revenue}
║   Highest Single Transaction: \$${max_rev}
║     (${max_product} on ${max_date})
╠════════════════════════════════════════════╣
║ DETAILED BREAKDOWN
$(cat "${TEMP_RESULTS}" | sed 's/^/║   /')
╠════════════════════════════════════════════╣
║ TEMP FILES USED
║   Input:     ${TEMP_INPUT}
║   Processed: ${TEMP_PROCESSED}
║   Results:   ${TEMP_RESULTS}
║   Summary:   ${TEMP_SUMMARY}
╚════════════════════════════════════════════╝
EOF

echo "  Summary report generated."
echo ""

# --- Stage 5: Display Final Report ---
echo "[Stage 5] Final Report:"
echo ""
cat "${TEMP_SUMMARY}"
echo ""

# --- List all temp files created by this pipeline ---
echo "=== Temp Files Created ==="
ls -la /tmp/myapp-$$.tmp /tmp/myapp-$$-*.tmp 2>/dev/null
echo ""

# --- Cleanup ---
echo "=== Cleanup ==="
echo "Removing temporary files..."

for tmpfile in "${TEMP_INPUT}" "${TEMP_PROCESSED}" "${TEMP_RESULTS}" "${TEMP_SUMMARY}"; do
    if [ -f "${tmpfile}" ]; then
        rm -f "${tmpfile}"
        echo "  Removed: ${tmpfile}"
    fi
done

echo ""
echo "Pipeline complete. All temporary files cleaned up."
